calendar.matters:
Petition To Allow Modification And Revocation Of The Bypass Trust With Consent Of All Beneficiaries; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dylan Recht for petitioner Kwai Sim Yuen Tin.

The Court observed that the relief requested by the petition appeared to be a posthumous attempt to do estate planning, which is beyond the authority of powers of the Probate Court.
Mr. Recht contended that the bypass trust fails for the purpose it was created, i.e., to obtain tax relief. He stated that the revision of tax law increasing the exemption amount occurred to close to the date of death for the revision of the estate planning documents. He noted that under the provisions of the trust the trustee has the power to make distributions from the bypass trust for her comfort, well-being and happiness, even to invade and distribute the entirety of the trust corpus. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
